chinese: USM 底层模糊的 σ 值
alpha = max(R,G,B) 重建透明通道

chinese: 半球采样方向数 (越大越精确越慢)

在工具面板中展开几何变形分类

chinese: 在工具面板中展开贴图处理分类
english: Expand Texture Processing category in tool panel

chinese: 基础光影层的生成方式
english: How the base lighting layer is generated

english: Base layer blur strength (Heavy Blur mode)

english: When an image node is selected in the node editor, the right-click menu will show a shortcut to open and edit the image

chinese: 打破已固化的量化边界
拼接重叠区域占图像的比例

chinese: 控制保留细节的尺度，值越大保留更大尺度的结构
english: Controls detail scale; higher values preserve larger structures

english: Controls lighting separation scale; higher values remove coarser lighting

english: Controls random sample count; more samples = closer to original

english: No image found in selected nodes
Inject TPDF noise to mask banding

english: Note: Advanced Seam may crop the image

english: Reference image for color style transfer

chinese: 用原始亮度替换结果亮度，避免暗部裁切损失
english: Replace result luminance with original luminance to avoid shadow clipping loss

chinese: 网点与底色的组合方式

english: Place Image | Drag to move | Corner to scale | Rotate ({angle}°) [Shift snap] | Enter=Apply | Esc=Cancel

chinese: 请在图像编辑器中打开一张图片
